title: erigeron compositus var. typicus
intro: Erigeron compositus var. typicus, commonly known as fleabane, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing respiratory issues. Fleabane can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
